name: Origami Studio
description: Free Mac-only prototyping tool by Meta using a visual patch-based programming model for complex interactive interfaces. Used internally at Facebook/Meta and released publicly.

seo.title: Origami Studio — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: Origami Studio: Free Mac-only prototyping tool by Meta using a visual patch-based programming model for complex interactive interfaces. Used internally at Faceb

when_to_use: Complex iOS interaction prototype built with patch-based logic
Gesture-driven animation validated before engineering handoff
Meta-internal UI concept explored using visual patch editor
Prototype exported as video for stakeholder walkthrough
Multi-state interaction built with Origami's layer component

pros: Patch-based programming nails complex interaction logic
Free and maintained by Meta for years
Great for sensor-driven and gesture-heavy prototypes
Output feels closer to real apps than Figma prototypes
cons: Steep learning curve versus timeline-based tools
Meta's commitment to external users feels uncertain
Smaller community than ProtoPie or Framer
review.verdict: Powerful free tool for serious interaction design, if you're on Mac and willing to learn a patch-based paradigm.
review.best_for: Mac interaction designers prototyping complex, sensor-rich mobile experiences.
review.not_for: Windows/Linux teams or designers who prefer timeline-based prototyping.
